content.content:
{"body":"Based on discussions with @hattrill and @ValWood , and on comments from @raymond91125 in https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/30552

it was proposed to update the definitions of protein carrier activity and unfolded protein holdase activity as follows:

- [x] protein carrier activity GO:0140597: 
Current definition: Binding to and carrying a protein between two different locations by moving along with the target protein.
New definition: Binding to and carrying a protein to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location by moving along with the target protein.

- [x] unfolded protein holdase activity GO:0140309
Current definition: A protein carrier activity that binds to a protein in an unfolded state and escorts it between two different locations. The unfolded protein carrier prevents aggregation of the target protein while it's being delivers to its final destination.
New definition: A protein carrier activity that binds to a protein in an unfolded state and escorts it to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location. The unfolded protein carrier prevents aggregation of the target protein while it's being delivers to its final destination.","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABAoQMZw","author":{"login":"hattrill"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Sorry to reopen this (then accidently close it then reopen it).
The def for 'protein carrier activity' GO:0140597 is still too restrictive, could we make it more similar to the parent term i.e.
"Directly binding to a protein and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location."","createdAt":"2026-04-28T16:26:23Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31601#issuecomment-4337175655","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABAoib9A","author":{"login":"raymond91125"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@dragon-ai-agent please revise GO:0140597 definition as commented by hattrill.","createdAt":"2026-04-28T17:03:32Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"EYES","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31601#issuecomment-4337474548","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABAoisJg","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25066706978)

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0140104
name: molecular carrier activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Directly binding to a specific ion or molecule and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location." [GOC:molecular_function_refactoring, GOC:pdt]
comment: Note that a carrier moves with its substrate/cargo, while a transporter does not move with the cargo, but facilitates the change in localization.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Revise GO:0140597 (protein carrier activity) definition per #31601" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Updates the textual definition of `protein carrier activity` (GO:0140597) per @hattrill's request in #31601, to mirror the structure of its parent term `molecular carrier activity` (GO:0140104). The previous wording was deemed too restrictive.

- **Old:** "Binding to and carrying a protein to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location by moving along with the target protein."
- **New:** "Directly binding to a protein and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location."

Compare with parent GO:0140104: "Directly binding to a specific ion or molecule and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location."

The xref `[PMID:7628437]` is retained.

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue analyzed; @hattrill requested an updated definition for GO:0140597 to align with its parent term, and @raymond91125 instructed the agent to apply that revision.
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology validated prior to changes.
- [x] RESEARCH: N/A — definitional rewording per curator request, no new biological claims.
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: Verified GO:0140597 and parent GO:0140104 via `obo-grep.pl`.
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS: N/A — no logical-axiom changes; alignment is with parent term wording.
- [x] EDITS: Used `obo-checkout.pl` / `obo-checkin.pl` workflow with `terms/GO_0140597.obo`.
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: Unchanged. Logical definition (`molecular carrier activity` and `has_primary_input some protein`) is unaffected.
- [x] SPECIALIZED-EDITS: N/A — no obsoletion, no CHEBI/RHEA/EC, no taxon constraint.
- [x] METADATA: `created_by`/`creation_date` left untouched (existing term). `term_tracker_item` for #31601 was already present.
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: SPARQL QC checks all PASS (16/16, 0 violations). `make travis_build` not run in full due to runtime; QC and OBO-syntax checks performed.
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION: No new references added; existing PMID:7628437 retained.
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED: Single-line def change to `src/ontology/go-edit.obo`.
- [x] ISSUE-ALIGNMENT: Matches @hattrill's proposed wording verbatim.

## Test plan

- [x] `obo-grep.pl` confirms updated definition on GO:0140597.
- [x] SPARQL QC suite passes (equivalent-classes, trailing-whitespace, owldef-self-reference, synonym-label-match, replacedby-obsolete, replacedby-namespace, missing-namespace, duplicate-(exact-)synonym, non-IRI/anyURI, obsolete/definition constraints, one-to-one xrefs, xref-syntax).
- [ ] CI build to confirm full ODK validation.

Closes #31601 (definition portion); GO:0140309 was already updated previously per the original issue body.

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: \`claude-opus-4-7\`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25066706978)
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh issue comment 31601 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
Definition for GO:0140597 has been revised per @hattrill's suggestion to align with the parent term `molecular carrier activity` (GO:0140104).

- **Old:** "Binding to and carrying a protein to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location by moving along with the target protein."
- **New:** "Directly binding to a protein and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location."

For comparison, the parent's definition is: "Directly binding to a specific ion or molecule and delivering it either to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location."

The PMID:7628437 reference is retained, and SPARQL QC checks pass. PR: #32007

Note: GO:0140309 (`unfolded protein holdase activity`) was already updated to the new wording in the earlier round of changes referenced in the issue body, so no further action there.
